citations.desc: Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries.
citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany the APHIS Official during the inspection process at 11:10am on
Thursday, March 26, 2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee by knocking on the door to the residence and
was informed by a family member that the licensee was away for the day. Failure to provide access to the facility,
animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is
serious and may result in enforcement action.
End Section

narrative:
2.126(b) 
   
Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries. 
A responsible adult was not available to accompany the APHIS Official during the inspection process at 11:10am on 
Thursday, March 26, 2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee by knocking on the door to the residence and 
was informed by a family member that the licensee was away for the day. Failure to provide access to the facility, 
animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is 
serious and may result in enforcement action. 
 
 
End Section
